"[12] ADV RP HE IS PRETTY OUT OF THE AREA FROM WHERE IT OCCURD // RP WAS FOLLOWING VEH TO GET HIM TO STOP // ADV RP TO KEEP HIS PHONE CLOSE INCASE PSD NEEDS TO 1021 HIM - RP CPYS"
"[9] REQ CHP FOR 1110 - DUE TO DAMAGES ON VEH"
"[5] RP ADV WHI SD -PLT 9MND349 -CUT HIM OFF CAUSING HIM TO TC IN DELINUATORS "
"[1] PILE OF WHI TARPS IN #2 AND 3 LN // BLK RANGE ROVER IN CD JNO OF 1125 UNK IF ASSOC"
"[1] TREES ON FIRE IN EMPTY LOT "
"[6] RP NEG INJ / THINKS OTHER DRVR ALSO OKAY"
"[3] RP SEMI TK W/ TANKER TRLR VS RED PK TK"
"[3] BLU KIA SPORTAGE (RENTAL) VS TAN HOND CRV // REAR ENDED RP // RP REQ 11-10 // RP ADVS NOW IN P.LOT OF NOMAD VENTURES"
"[27] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj to 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt by CHP [Shared]"
"[25] A6-030 DRIVER OF OVERTURNED VEH POSS BROKEN ARM EXPEDITE CALFIRE [Shared]"
"[15] ANOTHER RP CALLING ADVS BTWN MM 110-117 // ADVS LOOKED LIKE 3 VEHS ONE ROLLED OVER [Shared]"
"[3] PER DUP OT'D VEH ON ITS SIDE / GRY SUV IN CD"

Log.Location: "I10 E / Eagle Mountain Rd Exit 189, Mm 102"
Log.LocationDesc: "I10 E Eagle Mountain Rd, Exit 189, MM 102"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] COLD/CLOUDY AND STRONG WINDS//TRAVEL ADVISORY FOR ALL VEHS"
"[31] CT631 -- ADVSD @ 0230 HOURS // CT SET UP NON-MANNED CLSR // ADVSD CLSR WILL BE IN PLACE FOR MULTIPLE DAYS PER FIRE"
"[30] ^CT631 -- 1097 W/ CLSR FOR SB HAMMER RD"
"[29] ^CT631 -- 1097 W/ MESSAGE BOARD // CT WILL BE SETTING UP A CLSR FOR SB HAMMER RD, WILL ADVS WHEN CLSR IN PLACE"
"[28] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from AOD-Assist Other Departments to CLOSURE of a Road by CHP"
"[27] B85-003 97/98 TALKED TO BATTALLION CHIEF -- ITS A SUSTAINED FIRE HAS BEEN BURNING ALL WEEK // NO NEED FOR CHP TO STANDBY // CORD AND CT WILL HANDLE"
"[24] [Notification] [CHP]-^1039 CT631, ADVS THEY ONLY HAVE ONE WORKING SIGN AT THIS TIME // WILL INQ WHAT SIDE THEY WANT IT ON WHEN 1097"
"[17] PER CORDS - ETA 45MIN O/L - WILL PROVIDE PRE WARNING and CLOSURE SIGNS"
"[15] [Notification] [CHP]-^CT631 CB -- INQ WHAT CNTY FIRE WANTS DISPLAYED ON THE MESSAGE BOARD?"
"[14] ^1039 CT631-1, CPZ LINE 6, WILL CALL HIS SUPV and WILL BE ENRT W/ SIGNS"
"[13] ^1021 CT631, NA, PLS ADVS IF CORD IS ABLE TO SUPPLY SIGNS FOR CLSR, WILL CONTINUE CALLING REST OF 631 CREW"
"[12] PER HECTOR TAMAYO WILL NOTIFY ONCALL CPZ LINE 6 - WILL RECALL W/ ETA"
"[8] [Notification] [CHP]-CT CPZ LINE 6, REF LINE 7 CT WOULDN'T HANDLE CLSR NOT ON SR-98, WILL INQ WITH TRAVELWAY CREW IF CNTY FIRE CAN BORROW SIGNAGE"
"[7] TASK .327 CT11, LINE 6 / DOES CT HANDLE CLOSING HAMMER AT 98 OR IS THIS COUNTY ROAD HANDLE?"
"[6] PER ICSO ** CLOSURE ON HAMMER RD FROM 98 TO ANZA - 98 WILL REMAIN OPEN - ONLY REQ'ING SIGNS** "
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-CT CPZ LOG, INQ IF CNTY FIRE CLOSING SR-98 OR HAMMERS RD? ALSO DOES CNTY FIRE NEED JUST SIGNS OR CT TO MANAGE SIGNS?"
"[4] TASK .327 CT11, REQ SIGNAGE FOR ROAD CLOSURE LINE 3"
"[3] ** ON SR 98 CLOSURE FROM HAMMERS RD TO ANZA **"
"[2] REQ'ING TO ADVS CT IF THEY CAN BORROW SIGNS DUE TO CLOSURE DUE TO FIRE"
"[1] ICSO LL ADVS CNTY FIRE IS 97 / REQ'ING ROAD CLOSURE FROM 98 TO ANZA"
"[5] SR120W (TIOGA PASS - CLOSED AT THE YOSEMITE PARK GATE "
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE "
"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395// ** RESIDENTAIL ACCESS PERMITTED**"
